pets.name: Anchor
pets.theme: Steady and reassuring when work feels heavy and motivation is hard to find.

pets.name: Atlas
pets.theme: Calm under emotional weight and naturally helps sort scattered priorities.

pets.name: Beacon
pets.theme: Gentle and alert—helps you return when stress and distractions compete.

pets.name: Bridge
pets.theme: Patient at the threshold, easing the step from emotional load into action.

pets.name: Drift
pets.theme: Soft-spirited and restorative when pressure and fatigue arrive together.

pets.name: Ember
pets.theme: Warm but easily dampened—benefits from clear structure and small wins.

pets.name: Flux
pets.theme: Curious and quick-moving; thrives when distractions are gently contained.

pets.name: Harbor
pets.theme: Inviting at the start line when motivation and hesitation meet.

pets.name: Haven
pets.theme: Low-key and restorative when drive fades before energy returns.

pets.name: Helm
pets.theme: Organized at heart and sensitive to interruptions that break flow.

pets.name: Latch
pets.theme: Methodical and supportive when planning and starting both feel sticky.

pets.name: Ledger
pets.theme: Orderly and honest about limits when structure and tiredness overlap.

pets.name: Nudge
pets.theme: Light-footed and playful—helps redirect attention back to the task.

pets.name: Pause
pets.theme: Understands when attention wanders and energy is running low.

pets.name: Summit
pets.theme: Encouraging at the first step and patient through late-session fatigue.

pets.name: Tide
pets.theme: Even-keeled across many friction patterns—a balanced working companion.
